title: SkyBlock Together
description: Ready for a new SkyBlock experiencie with your friends? Welcome to SkyBlock Together a unique world with a hardcore experiencie of SkyBlock parcels, this is going to make skyblock a harder way to play, with store, and your skill you need to survive...
body:
![SkyBlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b454147b7cc57d54a9926b5571f0aa58aefdc18.png)

![What we add?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54b9a99028395d7401993f25f88dc32c10484212.png)

### Sky Blocks In the same world with parcels, and
### custom generation



> **✅ Player Shop**
> **✅ Barrier for parcels**
> **✅ Hardcore Sky Block**
> **✅ More features...**

Are you ready for a new skyblock experience?

The plugin brings multiplayer SkyBlock to a single world – no need for separate worlds per player with a preventing griefing metodh and accidents with automatic island protection.

Adds more depth and replayability with optional hardcore and trading systems.

Saves server resources by running all islands in one world.

If you die your island restart so think when are you leaving your island...

![SETUP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a364e6172ae1ea9a146580b138810d0de20a2211.png)

🌠 Set-up a Server with [Paper](https://papermc.io/)

- Download [World Edit 1.20.1](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/worldedit)
- Download Our Plugin
- Put both files on the plugin folder
- Put a void world in your server (example)
- In the plugin config file replace with your skyblock world name

![WIKI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd9928bf7ccab2cadad0bdbbe2af515e589ecaad_0.webp)

[Wiki](https://skyblock-parcels.fandom.com/wiki/SkyBlock_Parcels_Wiki)


```
THIS IS AN EARLY ACCESS PLUGIN BE AWARE
GITHUB COMING SOON...
MORE VERSIONS...
```
